productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Dios Brown Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style, you shouldn't deprive it of it! These Dios leather flip-flops from buckaroo offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. The criss-cross leather straps add to the comfort level, while the mid-foot fabric strap in eye-catching colours makes the flip-flops look amazingly attractive. It was never easier to look so perfectly relaxed and spectacular at the same time! Pair them with jeans or chinos and have a great day! Upper Criss-cross leather straps for durability and comfort Mid foot over-the-foot colourful strap in woven fabric for added attraction, support and comfort Leather toe separator for more comfort and moisture-absorption Leather detailing on leather strap for added attraction Midsole Firm footbed for extra support in all-day wear Branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured multi-drectional lugs all over the footbed for improved grip on all surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
